dispatch_rules.description: Rules to match an HTTP request and dispatch that request to a service. Structure is [documented below](#nested_dispatch_rules).

domain.description: Domain name to match against. The wildcard "*" is supported if specified before a period: "*.". Defaults to matching all domains: "*".

path.description: Pathname within the host. Must start with a "/". A single "*" can be included at the end of the path. The sum of the lengths of the domain and path may not exceed 100 characters.

service.description: Pathname within the host. Must start with a "/". A single "*" can be included at the end of the path. The sum of the lengths of the domain and path may not exceed 100 characters.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
